lanes.name: ui-layout-fidelity-pass
lanes.objective: Increase generated UI fidelity by improving position/size/style mapping for core widgets while preserving trace metadata.
deliverables: Refine src/migrator/ui_codegen.py layout/style mapping rules for core widgets and containers
Keep deterministic generation and fallback warning behavior
Add/extend tests for layout/style serialization and widget output assertions
Document known fidelity gaps and constraints in lane handoff

lanes.name: runtime-behavior-wiring
lanes.objective: Connect generated UI components to generated behavior store/actions with deterministic import/use contracts.
deliverables: Define and implement deterministic integration contract between gen-ui outputs and gen-behavior-store outputs
Add generated wiring hooks/imports without breaking existing scaffold generation
Add tests that validate wiring artifacts and duplicate-safe naming integration
Update technical/user docs if command outputs or verification flow changes

lanes.name: real-sample-e2e-regression
lanes.objective: Automate real-sample migrate-e2e regression and report extraction/mapping/fidelity risk trends.
deliverables: Add script/command flow to execute migrate-e2e across agreed real XML sample set
Produce consolidated regression summary report (success/failure counts, stage-level failures, top warnings)
Update docs for real-sample validation workflow and artifact locations
Capture unresolved malformed/XML parsing blockers explicitly in handoff
